# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    system {
        name "apply-groups-regex"
    }
    groups {
        group "iface-defaults" {
            router "Base" {
                interface "<to-.*>" {
                    ipv4 {
                        primary {
                            prefix-length 31
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        interface "to-r2" {
            apply-groups "iface-defaults"
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.0.0
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-r3" {
            apply-groups-exclude "iface-defaults"
            apply-groups "iface-defaults"
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.0.2
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
